Quiet luxury, made to be lived in. Velmora began with a simple belief: that fine jewelry shouldn't wait
            for special occasions. Each piece is crafted in 18K gold plating over
            a hypoallergenic base, designed in our studio and finished by hand —
            so it feels as considered as it looks, every single day. jewelry atelier craftsmanship gold
